book.title: Universal Physics
book.subtitle: A Map of Why a Final Theory Is Open — and What Would Close It
book.designCredit: Site and book design inspired by Dan Hollick's Making Software (makingsoftware.com) — inspiration only; no copy, illustrations, or assets reproduced.

conventions.contentPolicy: Source .md pages are FROZEN. Trim instructions below may only drop wiki-navigation chrome (YAML frontmatter, 'See also' link blocks, 'Start here' nav, contribution how-tos, inter-page link syntax converted to cross-references). Body text, claims, epistemic tags, and referee verdicts must be reproduced verbatim.
conventions.linkHandling: Convert internal wiki links to chapter/section cross-references with page numbers; convert links to non-chapter working notes into citations of the form 'Working note: <title> (repo: notes/<file>)'.
conventions.noteOnIterationOne: Iteration 1 produced the wiki's base pages and has no standalone synthesis note; its synthesis is the opening sections of FINDINGS.md (Chapter 21). Iterations 2-6 each have a synthesis note, included as Chapters 22-26.

frontMatter.title: Title Page

First edition, June 2026. universal-physics.khe.money - github.com/HKTITAN/universal-physics. Research and content: Harshit Khemani + Claude. Design inspired by Dan Hollick's Making Software (makingsoftware.com).

parts.title: PART V — THE INVESTIGATION
parts.notes: The ~30 non-synthesis working notes under notes/ are NOT chapters. Wherever a synthesis chapter links to one, render the link as a citation: 'Working note: <title> (repo: notes/<filename>)'. The full notes index (notes/README.md) is cited once in the Part V opener and in About This Book.
